answers: Keep asking questions - curiosity drives achievement!
Fun fact: Honey never spoils — archaeologists have found 3000-year-old honey in Egyptian tombs still perfectly edible!
Did you know? Octopuses have three hearts, blue blood, and can edit their own RNA. Nature is wild!
Curiosity is a superpower. The most successful people never stop asking 'why' and 'what if'. Keep exploring!

feelings.question: tell me a fun fact and joke
feelings.answer: Fun fact: Honestly, I don't know what the heck is going on. But I can assure you that it's not spam. Joke: "What do you call a pig with no legs?" Answer: A porker!
